hindi: आरती श्री वृषभानुसुता की। श्री राधा कृष्ण महिमा गुण गाता॥
english: Aarti of Radha, daughter of King Vrishabhanu; singing the glories of Radha and Krishna
roman: Aarti Shri Vrishbhanusuta Ki, Shri Radha Krishna Mahima Gun Gaata

hindi: राधा रानी की कुंज बिहार में, श्री कृष्ण के संग। राधा की भक्ति से मिले, हरि के चरण अनंग॥
english: Radha Rani sports in the groves alongside Shri Krishna; through devotion to Radha one attains the feet of Lord Hari
roman: Radha Rani Ki Kunj Bihar Mein Shri Krishna Ke Sang, Radha Ki Bhakti Se Mile Hari Ke Charan Anang

english: Aarti of Radha, daughter of Vrishabhanu

hindi: श्याम वरण गोरी राधिका, वृंदावन की रानी। राधे राधे जपत सब, मिले कृष्ण भवानी॥
english: Dark Krishna and fair Radhika, queen of Vrindavan; chanting Radhe Radhe all find union with Krishna
roman: Shyam Varan Gori Radhika Vrindavan Ki Rani, Radhe Radhe Japat Sab Mile Krishna Bhavani

english: Aarti of Radha, daughter of Vrishabhanu

hindi: राधा जी की आरती जो कोई भक्त गावे। प्रेम भक्ति और कृष्ण कृपा, सहज ही पावे॥
english: Whoever sings this aarti of Radha Ji; easily attains love, devotion and Krishna's grace
roman: Radha Ji Ki Aarti Jo Koi Bhakt Gaave, Prem Bhakti Aur Krishna Kripa Sahaj Hi Paave

hindi: आरती श्री वृषभानुसुता की। श्री राधा कृष्ण महिमा गुण गाता॥
english: Aarti of Radha, daughter of King Vrishabhanu
